proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving pembrolizumab have a higher overall objective response rate than those who do not.
Patients receiving sotorasib have a higher overall objective response rate than those who do not.
Patients receiving olaparib have a higher overall objective response rate than those who do not.
Patients receiving osimertinib have a higher overall objective response rate than those who do not.

analyses.result_summary: Response rate 0.174 on pembrolizumab (n=25008) vs 0.164 off (n=24992); chi2 p=0.00341, diff=+0.0099.
Response rate 0.169 on sotorasib (n=17544) vs 0.169 off (n=32456); chi2 p=0.829, diff=+0.0008.
Response rate 0.170 on olaparib (n=14999) vs 0.169 off (n=35001); chi2 p=0.724, diff=+0.0013.
Response rate 0.165 on osimertinib (n=14976) vs 0.170 off (n=35024); chi2 p=0.179, diff=-0.0050.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with EGFR mutation (egfr_mutation=1) have a different overall objective response rate than those without it.
Patients with KRAS G12C (kras_g12c=1) have a different overall objective response rate than those without it.
Patients with ALK fusion (alk_fusion=1) have a different overall objective response rate than those without it.
Patients with BRCA2 mutation (brca2_mutation=1) have a different overall objective response rate than those without it.
Patients with STK11 mutation (stk11_mutation=1) have a different overall objective response rate than those without it.
Patients with TMB-high (tmb_high=1) have a different overall objective response rate than those without it.

analyses.result_summary: Response rate 0.165 with EGFR mutation (n=6517) vs 0.170 without (n=43483); diff=-0.0044, p=0.385.
Response rate 0.169 with KRAS G12C (n=6368) vs 0.169 without (n=43632); diff=+0.0004, p=0.952.
Response rate 0.164 with ALK fusion (n=2464) vs 0.169 without (n=47536); diff=-0.0057, p=0.481.
Response rate 0.162 with BRCA2 mutation (n=1519) vs 0.169 without (n=48481); diff=-0.0072, p=0.482.
Response rate 0.165 with STK11 mutation (n=7451) vs 0.170 without (n=42549); diff=-0.0042, p=0.379.
Response rate 0.182 with TMB-high (n=14258) vs 0.164 without (n=35742); diff=+0.0182, p=1.04e-06.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The benefit of pembrolizumab on objective response is greater for patients with higher PD-L1 TPS (positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and pdl1_tps).
Pembrolizumab response benefit is greater in TMB-high patients (positive treatment_pembrolizumab x tmb_high interaction).
STK11 mutations attenuate the response benefit of pembrolizumab (negative treatment_pembrolizumab x stk11_mutation interaction).
The response benefit of treatment_osimertinib is larger in patients with EGFR mutation (egfr_mutation=1) — i.e. positive treatment_osimertinib x egfr_mutation interaction.
The response benefit of treatment_sotorasib is larger in patients with KRAS G12C (kras_g12c=1) — i.e. positive treatment_sotorasib x kras_g12c interaction.
The response benefit of treatment_olaparib is larger in patients with BRCA2 mutation (brca2_mutation=1) — i.e. positive treatment_olaparib x brca2_mutation interaction.
Among EGFR-mutant patients, response rate is higher on treatment_osimertinib than off it.
Among KRAS G12C-mutant patients, response rate is higher on treatment_sotorasib than off it.
Among BRCA2-mutant patients, response rate is higher on treatment_olaparib than off it.

analyses.code: chi2 on treatment_osimertinib vs objective_response in egfr_mutation==1
analyses.result_summary: Among EGFR-mutant (n=6517): rate on treatment_osimertinib=0.164 (n=1973) vs off=0.166 (n=4544); diff=-0.0020, p=0.87.

analyses.code: chi2 on treatment_sotorasib vs objective_response in kras_g12c==1
analyses.result_summary: Among KRAS G12C-mutant (n=6368): rate on treatment_sotorasib=0.175 (n=2246) vs off=0.166 (n=4122); diff=+0.0081, p=0.43.

analyses.code: chi2 on treatment_olaparib vs objective_response in brca2_mutation==1
analyses.result_summary: Among BRCA2-mutant (n=1519): rate on treatment_olaparib=0.146 (n=417) vs off=0.168 (n=1102); diff=-0.0216, p=0.346.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among EGFR-wildtype patients, treatment_osimertinib does not improve response (no significant difference vs off).
Among KRAS-G12C-negative patients, treatment_sotorasib does not improve response (no significant difference vs off).
Among BRCA2-wildtype patients, treatment_olaparib does not improve response (no significant difference vs off).

analyses.code: chi2 on treatment_osimertinib vs objective_response in egfr_mutation==0
analyses.result_summary: Among EGFR-wildtype (n=43483): rate on treatment_osimertinib=0.166 (n=13003) vs off=0.171 (n=30480); diff=-0.0054, p=0.174.

analyses.code: chi2 on treatment_sotorasib vs objective_response in kras_g12c==0
analyses.result_summary: Among KRAS-G12C-negative (n=43632): rate on treatment_sotorasib=0.169 (n=15298) vs off=0.169 (n=28334); diff=-0.0003, p=0.954.

analyses.code: chi2 on treatment_olaparib vs objective_response in brca2_mutation==0
analyses.result_summary: Among BRCA2-wildtype (n=48481): rate on treatment_olaparib=0.171 (n=14582) vs off=0.169 (n=33899); diff=+0.0020, p=0.601.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (worse) is associated with lower probability of objective response (negative coefficient).
Patients with stage IV disease have lower objective response than non-stage IV.
Patients with brain metastases have lower objective response.
In this cohort, higher albumin associated with higher response (positive coef).
In this cohort, higher LDH associated with lower response (negative coef).
In this cohort, higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio associated with lower response (negative coef).
In this cohort, higher CRP associated with lower response (negative coef).
In this cohort, more weight loss associated with lower response (negative coef).
Female patients (sex_female=1) have a different objective response rate than males.
Increasing age is associated with lower probability of objective response.
Ever-smokers have a different objective response rate than never-smokers (overall, irrespective of treatment).

analyses.result_summary: Log-odds per year of age = +0.000514, p=0.668.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Pembrolizumab benefit on response differs between squamous and adenocarcinoma histology (treatment_pembrolizumab x squamous interaction non-zero).
Pembrolizumab response benefit is greater in ever-smokers than in never-smokers (positive treatment_pembrolizumab x ever_smoker interaction).
Among KRAS G12C-mutant patients, osimertinib does not improve response rate (no significant difference).
Among EGFR-mutant patients, sotorasib does not improve response rate.

analyses.code: chi2 osimertinib x response in kras_g12c==1
analyses.result_summary: Rate 0.166 on osimertinib (n=1890) vs 0.171 off (n=4478); diff=-0.0045, p=0.69.

analyses.code: chi2 sotorasib x response in egfr_mutation==1

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher PD-L1 TPS is associated with higher overall objective response (positive coefficient).

analyses.result_summary: Log-odds per unit PD-L1 TPS = +0.166, p=0.00319.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the PD-L1-high half of patients (TPS at or above median), pembrolizumab raises response rate vs not on pembrolizumab.
In the PD-L1-low half of patients (TPS below median), pembrolizumab provides smaller (or no) response benefit vs off pembrolizumab.

analyses.code: chi2 pembrolizumab x response in pdl1_tps >= median
analyses.result_summary: PD-L1 high: rate 0.182 on pembro vs 0.161 off; diff=+0.0215, p=6.93e-06.

analyses.code: chi2 pembrolizumab x response in pdl1_tps < median
analyses.result_summary: PD-L1 low: rate 0.165 on pembro vs 0.167 off; diff=-0.0018, p=0.708.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on pembrolizumab, biomarkers, and prognostics, treatment_pembrolizumab retains an independent association with response.
In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on pembrolizumab, biomarkers, and prognostics, pdl1_tps retains an independent association with response.
In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on pembrolizumab, biomarkers, and prognostics, tmb_high retains an independent association with response.
In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on pembrolizumab, biomarkers, and prognostics, stk11_mutation retains an independent association with response.
In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on pembrolizumab, biomarkers, and prognostics, ecog_ps retains an independent association with response.
In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on pembrolizumab, biomarkers, and prognostics, stage_iv retains an independent association with response.
In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on pembrolizumab, biomarkers, and prognostics, has_brain_mets retains an independent association with response.
In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on pembrolizumab, biomarkers, and prognostics, albumin_g_dl retains an independent association with response.
In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response on pembrolizumab, biomarkers, and prognostics, ldh_u_l retains an independent association with response.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Three-way interaction: STK11 mutation modifies the magnitude of the pembrolizumab x PD-L1 TPS interaction (non-zero treatment_pembrolizumab x pdl1_tps x stk11_mutation).
Objective response rate differs by self-reported race/ethnicity category.
Objective response rate differs by insurance type.
diabetes_mellitus is associated with a different objective response rate (non-zero log-odds).
copd is associated with a different objective response rate (non-zero log-odds).
heart_failure is associated with a different objective response rate (non-zero log-odds).
chronic_kidney_disease is associated with a different objective response rate (non-zero log-odds).
autoimmune_disease is associated with a different objective response rate (non-zero log-odds).
interstitial_lung_disease_history is associated with a different objective response rate (non-zero log-odds).
liver_mets is associated with a different (likely lower) objective response rate.
bone_mets is associated with a different (likely lower) objective response rate.
adrenal_mets is associated with a different (likely lower) objective response rate.
pleural_effusion is associated with a different (likely lower) objective response rate.
The SNP snp_rs7412 is associated with objective response (non-zero log-odds).
The SNP snp_rs1050828 is associated with objective response (non-zero log-odds).
The SNP snp_rs4880 is associated with objective response (non-zero log-odds).
The SNP snp_rs3813867 is associated with objective response (non-zero log-odds).
The SNP snp_rs1800629 is associated with objective response (non-zero log-odds).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a fully-adjusted multivariable logit including all treatment-biomarker interactions and prognostic covariates, treatment_pembrolizumab:pdl1_tps remains a non-zero interaction coefficient.
In a fully-adjusted multivariable logit including all treatment-biomarker interactions and prognostic covariates, treatment_pembrolizumab:tmb_high remains a non-zero interaction coefficient.
In a fully-adjusted multivariable logit including all treatment-biomarker interactions and prognostic covariates, treatment_pembrolizumab:stk11_mutation remains a non-zero interaction coefficient.
In a fully-adjusted multivariable logit including all treatment-biomarker interactions and prognostic covariates, treatment_osimertinib:egfr_mutation remains a non-zero interaction coefficient.
In a fully-adjusted multivariable logit including all treatment-biomarker interactions and prognostic covariates, treatment_sotorasib:kras_g12c remains a non-zero interaction coefficient.
In a fully-adjusted multivariable logit including all treatment-biomarker interactions and prognostic covariates, treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation remains a non-zero interaction coefficient.

proposed_hypotheses.text: EGFR mutation status and TMB-high are negatively associated (EGFR-mutant cancers tend to be TMB-low).
Among EGFR-mutant patients, pembrolizumab provides little or no response benefit (small/negative diff).
Among ALK-fusion-positive patients, pembrolizumab provides little response benefit.

analyses.code: chi2 pembrolizumab x response in egfr_mutation==1
analyses.result_summary: Rate 0.168 on pembro vs 0.162 off in EGFR+; diff=+0.0055, p=0.573.

analyses.code: chi2 pembrolizumab x response in alk_fusion==1
analyses.result_summary: Rate 0.169 on pembro vs 0.158 off in ALK+; diff=+0.0114, p=0.477.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower objective response (negative coef).
Higher pain_nrs is associated with lower objective response (negative coef).
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with lower objective response (negative coef).
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with lower objective response (negative coef).
More prior lines of therapy are associated with lower probability of objective response (negative coef).
Prior immunotherapy attenuates the response benefit of pembrolizumab on this exposure (negative interaction).
Among EGFR-mutant patients, the response benefit of osimertinib persists after adjustment for ECOG, stage IV, brain mets, and albumin (positive adjusted log-odds).
Among KRAS G12C-mutant patients, response benefit of sotorasib persists after adjustment for prognostics.
Among BRCA2-mutant patients, response benefit of olaparib persists after adjustment for prognostics.
In PD-L1-high (TPS >= 0.5) and STK11-wildtype patients, pembrolizumab response benefit is the largest among biomarker-defined subgroups.

logit (kras_g12c==1): objective_response ~ sotorasib + ecog_ps + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + albumin_g_dl
